name: Best Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pkg. frozen chopped broccoli, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water and salt to a boil.
2. Add rice; cover and remove from heat. Let sit for 5 minutes.
3. Melt butter in skillet; saute onion and celery until tender.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine rice, celery, onion with remaining ingredients.
5. Pour into a greased 1 1/2 qt. casserole.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
Serves: 6
